headline: Meta Display AI assistant for real computer work on smart glasses

site_brief.audience: people evaluating AI assistants for Meta smart glasses and display-style wearable workflows
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Meta Display AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Meta Display AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can become the action layer for hands-free Meta Display workflows beyond simple voice answers

summary: A practical, field-tested guide to using Super as a Meta Display AI assistant that goes beyond voice answers—operating real apps, reusing a computer-use cache, and supporting hands-free wearable workflows with confirmation moments and safety in mind.
